zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac於1235年出生在法國米迪-列內斯格斯阿馬尼亞克時，他的父親Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet45歲，母親Pincelle d’Albret51歲。他於1260年與Martha de Béarn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年在法國奧其坦尼格斯奧享年50歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯格斯奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac于1235年出生在法国米迪-列內斯格斯阿馬尼亞克时，他的父亲Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet45岁，母亲Pincelle d’Albret51岁。他于1260年与Martha de Béarn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1285年在法国奧其坦尼格斯奧享年50岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯格斯奧。

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac was born in 1235, in Armagnac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet, was 45 and his mother, Pincelle d’Albret, was 51. He married Martha de Béarn in 1260. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1285, in Auch, Gers, Occitanie, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac est né en 1235, à Armagnac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Pincelle d’Albret, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Martha de Béarn en 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1285, à Auch, Gers, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac 1235 in Armagnac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet 45 und seine Mutter Pincelle d’Albret 51. Er hat 1260 Martha de Béarn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1285 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac è nato il nel 1235 nel Armagnac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Pincelle d’Albret, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Martha de Béarn nel 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1285, nel Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnacが1235年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスジャーズアルマグナックで生まれた時，父Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquetは45歳，母Pincelle d’Albretは51歳であった。1260年にMartha de Béarnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1285年にフランスオクシタニージャーズアウチで50歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスジャーズアウチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac(이)가 1235년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 그르스 아마그나크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Pincelle d’Albret(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1260년 Martha de Béarn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 프랑스 옥시탠이 그르스 오치에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 그르스 오치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac nasceu em 1235, em Armagnac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Pincelle d’Albret, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha de Béarn em 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1285, em Auch, Gers, Occitanie, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac родился в 1235 г. в местности армагнак, джирс, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Pincelle d’Albret, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha de Béarn в 1260 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1285 г. в местности ауч, джирс, окситани, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ауч, джирс, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald VI Comte d'Armagnac nació en 1235, en Armagnac, Gers, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Roger Comte d'Armagnac et Vicomte de Fezensaquet, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Pincelle d’Albret, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Martha de Béarn en 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1285, en Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Auch, Gers, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
